notes: Participant set IS the subject set (three South American centroids), so the participant gate already does the work of primary_target -- domain verbs like 'tariff' and 'sanction' are cross-filtered and safe.
Third-party leaders deliberately absent (Trump, Bessent, Lula, Milei, Bolsonaro). Heads of state are already carried by the centroid_anchor rows; putting them here would match all domestic politics.
ES needs both 'sanción' and 'sanciones': non-EN is pure substring and ó != o, so the accented singular does not cover the plural.
'OFAC' / 'USTR' are all-caps <=4 chars -> case-sensitive whole-word acronym path, safe.

DROPPED the IMF/FMI/swap-line term after audit: 'FMI' returned 19 titles of routine Argentine macro coverage (staff deals, reserve targets, pension reform). The Fund is multilateral, not a US instrument -- filing that as US coercion would be a false attribution. The genuinely US-leverage story (Treasury swap line) was n=1, not worth the 19 false positives.

OFAC / USTR / Section 301 / countervailing / decertif returned 0 matches in the 365d window and are KEPT deliberately: high-precision dormant anchors that cost nothing and give the placeholder somewhere to land future escalation.
